name: Termination Consequences — Employee Actions
text: Either Party may terminate this Agreement by providing notice or payment in lieu thereof, subject to compliance with applicable labour laws and the terms of this Agreement.
invalid_if: Termination without statutory notice or compensation
Termination in violation of labour protections
title: Termination of Employment
dispute_hotspots: System access revocation — employee claims locked out before final settlement
Property return dispute — company laptop contents
